CoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8192
  HashJoinExec: mode=Partitioned, join_type=RightAnti, on=[(c_custkey@0, o_custkey@1)]
    CoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8192
      RepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
        CoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8192
          FilterExec: c_mktsegment@1 = BUILDING, projection=[c_custkey@0]
            ParquetExec: table=customer
    CoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=8192
      RepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_custkey@1], 8), input_partitions=8
        ParquetExec: table=orders
